title: Peili Vision - VR Rehabilitation for Eye Care
problem: Vision rehabilitation after stroke or brain injury is limited, expensive, and requires specialized equipment and clinic visits.
solution: VR-based gamified vision rehabilitation exercises delivered via headset. Patients can do therapy at home with remote monitoring by clinicians.
traction_signals: Developing VR games for vision rehabilitation
regulatory_notes: Medical device pathway likely required for rehabilitation claims.
varden_fit: Low — specialized neuro/vision rehabilitation, not primary care infrastructure. Interesting niche but not core to Varden.
notes: Interesting example of VR in healthcare rehabilitation. Finnish startup.
